summary: Backend testing completed for Push Notification System. All 17 tests passed covering: auth flow, push token registration/unregistration, CRM webhook for order events, ticket webhook, and test push endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification implementation looks good - properly handles DeviceNotRegisteredError and marks tokens as inactive
Webhook signature verification is optional (allows for easier testing but should be enabled in production with WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET)
Consider adding rate limiting to webhook endpoints to prevent abuse
PushClient() is instantiated on each call in send_push_notification - could be a module-level singleton for better performance
seed_data_creation: Test push tokens created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_push_notifications.py. All endpoints tested: POST /api/push/register, POST /api/push/unregister, POST /api/webhooks/crm/order, POST /api/webhooks/crm/ticket, POST /api/push/test. Auth flow (login) verified working. CRM webhook URL: https://ios-auth-fix-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/webhooks/crm/order
